author: TonyMontana
content:
**Welcome To Module 1: The Introduction**

In this module, we will go over EXACTLY how to get the most VALUE from the program.
We will also set expectations, manage schedules and explain everything you need to know about The Accelerator.

It is super important you watch each video in the modules in order.

This will ensure you don't miss any key points and are fully prepared for the discord.

**Workshop 1 Content:** 👇

Lesson 1 - **Introduction To Accelerator**
- Welcome To The Accelerator Program!

Lesson 2 - **How To Use The Discord**
-  Full walkthrough on how to get the most value!

**Important Reminder**

Me, JDUB or any of the moderators will never private message you guys asking to invest money into a trading bot or copy signals.

There is a bunch of scam accounts going around and even after multiple reportings they just make new ones.

Do NOT message back Tony Montana if you get a DM.

**Watch Module 1 Here:** 👇
https://whop.com/scarface-trades/the-accelerator-U4q53fe1xXqoEr/app/

@everyone
